privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated participant tracking data created by a Python script during environment setup. Verification confirmed that the dataset generates exactly 20 normative participants and 1 contaminated participant identified as 'sub-099'. The anomalous participant 'sub-099' is generated with a baseline performance profile of 94-99% TOT across all blocks, corroborating the claim of a Block 1 TOT > 85% due to unauthorized gaming mouse usage. All file paths, calculation tolerances, and passing thresholds exactly match the export and evaluation logic.
